meaning: n.猴面包树,非洲产的一种巨树
examples: Baobab isn't quite satisfied with any of these explanations.
Baobab spent New Year in his container and slept rather well.
The village kids were still camped beneath the baobab, waiting for the poor bo to come down.
Per 100 grams, baobab actually has more soluble fiber than psyllium, the active ingredient used in laxatives.
The baobab fruit or pod basically resembles an oval gourd, or a slim downed version of a watermelon.
